appDesc.message: Answer customers in two keystrokes: reusable message templates with auto-filled variables inside WhatsApp Web.

placeholderHint.message: Tip: {name}, {today}, {time} and {tomorrow} are filled automatically ({hari_ini}, {jam}, {besok} work too). You can invent other placeholders like {total} and fill them while typing.

deleteSelectedConfirm.message: Delete $N$ templates? This cannot be undone.

notifDisabledWarning.message: Chrome notifications are disabled, so reminders can only show a badge on the toolbar icon. Enable notifications for Chrome in your system settings to see reminder popups.

importError.message: That file is not a valid QuickReply export. Nothing was changed.

noTemplatesYet.message: No templates yet — add your first one in the extension options.

openChatFirst.message: Open a chat first — or WhatsApp Web may have changed and an update is coming.

reminderCapReached.message: Free includes 2 active reminders. Pro makes them unlimited.

invalidTime.message: Pick a time in the future.

proPitch.message: Unlimited templates, unlimited reminders, and the fill-in form for placeholders.

proStatusOffline.message: Pro active (offline — will revalidate when the license server is reachable)

proStatusInvalid.message: Pro is paused: the license could not be verified. Everything you saved is untouched, and existing reminders still fire.

licenseErrorInvalid.message: That key was not accepted. Check for typos and try again.

licenseErrorNetwork.message: Could not reach the license server. Try again in a moment.
